title: FinancingProgram
description: An HDC financing program a developer can apply to — each defined by a published HDC (or joint HDC/HPD) term sheet PDF setting the loan structure, LTV/LTC caps, DSCR, subordinate-debt terms, and affordability requirements. Verified from nychdc.com/develop and the term-sheet PDFs (New Construction, ELLA, Mix and Match, Preservation, PACT Preservation, Sustainable Development Bonds). There is NO machine-readable program catalog today — the programs exist only as HTML pages and PDF term sheets. This schema models the program as a first-class, referenceable resource.

name.description: Program name as published (e.g. 'New Construction Program', 'ELLA', 'Mix and Match', 'Preservation Program', 'PACT Preservation Program').

description.description: What the program funds — e.g. 'Tax-exempt bonds and as-of-right 4% Low-Income Housing Tax Credits used with HDC's corporate reserves to create low, middle and moderate income housing.'

termSheetUrl.description: URL of the current published term sheet PDF.

termSheetVersion.description: Term-sheet version/date, e.g. '2024 Preservation Term Sheet'.

eligibleConstructionTypes.description: Whether the program funds new construction, rehabilitation, and/or preservation.

maxLtv.description: Maximum Loan-to-Value, where the term sheet states one (e.g. 0.85 for Mix and Match, 0.80 for ELLA).

maxLtc.description: Maximum Loan-to-Cost, where stated (e.g. 0.90 overall for ELLA).

minDscr.description: Minimum Debt Service Coverage Ratio, where stated (e.g. 1.15 for ELLA).

usesTaxExemptBonds.description: Whether the program uses tax-exempt bond financing (and thus as-of-right 4% LIHTC).

uses4PercentLIHTC.description: Whether the program pairs with as-of-right 4% Low-Income Housing Tax Credits.
